title: Manage trial and research material
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage trial and research material demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify scope and extent of work

pcs.text: Plan the trial or research to meet research objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan the trial or research to meet research objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan the trial or research to meet research objectives.

pcs.text: Assess data relevant to managing trial or research materials according to research parameters
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess data relevant to managing trial or research materials according to research parameters?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess data relevant to managing trial or research materials according to research parameters.

pcs.text: Identify and assess workplace health and safety hazards and risks relating to research
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and assess workplace health and safety hazards and risks relating to research?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and assess workplace health and safety hazards and risks relating to research.

pcs.text: Develop and cost workplace health and safety controls, and document in the trial or research design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and cost workplace health and safety controls, and document in the trial or research design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and cost workplace health and safety controls, and document in the trial or research design.

pcs.text: Identify and cost tools, equipment and machinery required for managing trial
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and cost tools, equipment and machinery required for managing trial?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and cost tools, equipment and machinery required for managing trial.

pcs.text: Identify and cost research materials, products and inputs, and confirm availability with suppliers, contractors and appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and cost research materials, products and inputs, and confirm availability with suppliers, contractors and appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and cost research materials, products and inputs, and confirm availability with suppliers, contractors and appropriate personnel.

pcs.text: Apply research design according to the trial or research plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply research design according to the trial or research plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply research design according to the trial or research plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify scope and extent of work

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor work activities for accuracy, validity and compliance to the parameters of the trial or research design.

pcs.text: Undertake staged data collection as required by the trial or research design, scheduling and access requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake staged data collection as required by the trial or research design, scheduling and access requirements.
